docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF DUE DILIGENCE IN ATTEMPTING SERVICE SERVICE FEE: $50.00 (WAIVED) REMARKS: PER BRANDON DAWKINS (OPERATIONS MANAGER): LEGAL DOCUMENTS CANNOT BE ACCEPTED AT THIS LOCATION.
